codeReview.summary: Clean, thorough removal of TUI dashboard and dependencies. 538 lines deleted across 7 files with no remaining references. Build succeeds and all 160 tests pass.

summary: The dependency-cleanup feature has been successfully implemented. All ratatui and crossterm dependencies have been removed from Cargo.toml. The src/tui/ directory (510 lines) and src/commands/dashboard.rs (16 lines) have been deleted. The main.rs has been updated to remove the tui module declaration, Dashboard command variant, and its handling. The commands/mod.rs has been updated to remove the dashboard module declaration. Build succeeds with only pre-existing dead code warnings unrelated to this change. All 160 tests pass (97 unit + 8 auth_commands + 6 http_errors + 37 integration + 12 serve_security). No remaining TUI references exist in the source code. The crossterm transitive dependency via comfy-table is acceptable as it's not a direct dependency.
